query: SELECT config_key, SUBSTRING(config_value, 1, 30) as val_preview, LENGTH(config_value) as val_len FROM platform_config WHERE config_key LIKE '%stripe%' OR config_key LIKE '%STRIPE%' OR config_key LIKE '%webhook%' OR config_key LIKE '%WEBHOOK%'
